steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: Some commentators lauded political blogs (positive view). The blank describes less ___ observers who countered with worries about polarization (negative view). "Less" + the blank must equal "less optimistic / more pessimistic."

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Sanguine means "optimistic, cheerfully confident." "Less sanguine" observers = those who were not optimistic about blogs — exactly the critics described.

Misanthropic (people-hating), earnest (sincere), and recalcitrant (defiant) don't capture the optimism/pessimism contrast.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
